name: Egotistical Ape
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>虚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>栄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>猿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by sending 1 Beast-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard. When this card is Special Summoned this way, you can activate 1 of these effects: ● Increase the Level of this card by the Level of the Beast-Type monster. ● Decrease the Level of this card by the Level of the Beast-Type monster.
flavor: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by sending 1 Beast-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard. When this card is Special Summoned this way, you can activate 1 of these effects: ● Increase the Level of this card by the Level of the Beast-Type monster. ● Decrease the Level of this card by the Level of the Beast-Type monster.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
